title: Add schemas for root contract manifests
goal: Implement #508 by adding explicit JSON schemas and validated loading for high-priority root contract manifests that currently load as freeform JSON.
Keep custom checks for cross-file invariants that are awkward or brittle in JSON Schema.
Update structured-file inventory and tests so future manifest shape changes have an obvious schema owner.
non_goals: Do not rewrite all root contracts at once.
Do not generate CLI code or alter public command behavior as part of this slice.
Do not make schemas so strict that additive extension becomes difficult.
Do not move runtime-only procedural behavior out of Python.

intent.outcome: selected high-priority root contract manifests are schema-backed and loaded through validation paths with actionable diagnostics
intent.constraints: repo/tool/language agnostic; preserve extensibility; keep #502 open for remaining child issues; avoid increasing ordinary startup burden
intent.latitude: may choose the smallest safe manifest subset, add schemas, add validated-loader helpers, update checker/tests/inventory, and preserve existing custom invariant checks
intent.escalation: stop if validation requires a broad schema for every contract manifest or creates behavior changes outside diagnostics

execution.next_step: archive this slice, close #508, refresh external evidence, then continue #509/#544 under #502

invariants: schema-backed manifests still allow future optional fields unless intentionally frozen
custom checks remain for cross-file and semantic invariants
schemas stay machinery, not first-contact reading

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: all machine-readable files are schema-backed, typed-validator-backed, generated/derived, or explicitly classified diagnostics

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #508 closes, continue #509/#544 or refreshed higher-priority issue

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: validated root contract manifest loading for the highest-value manifests
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: #509 package-local classification/extraction schemas and #544 executable inventory-claim validation
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: structured inventory claims can be descriptive unless delegated validators are explicit; #544 now owns making those claims executable where feasible
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: contract tooling, structured inventory, workspace CLI, ruff, planning doctor, and proof-selected commands passed
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: none for #508; #509/#544 continue the parent structured-file-contract lane

intent_interpretation.literal request: Continue backlog lane-by-lane while dogfooding the package and creating issues for actionable improvement signals.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: reduce freeform root contract JSON without broad codegen or product-shape expansion
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: schema-backed validation for a focused subset of root contract manifests
intent_interpretation.review guidance: verify the chosen subset removes real freeform risk while preserving extension points

execution_bounds.allowed paths: root contract schemas/manifests/loaders/checkers/tests, structured-file inventory/tests, active plan/state
execution_bounds.max changed files: about 16 unless proof reveals a narrow additional owner
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: before introducing a new contract package or replacing existing loader architecture
execution_bounds.stop before touching: code generation, public CLI behavior, or provider-specific behavior

stop_conditions.stop when: schemas would need to freeze intentionally extensible contract fields
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: root manifests cannot be validated without changing runtime semantics
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: changes spill into generated CLI/package roadmap or unrelated report behavior
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: existing tests prove selected schema boundaries are too strict

context_budget.live working set: issue #508, active plan, summary, contract_tooling loader/checker code, structured inventory
context_budget.recoverable later: historical archive evidence and unrelated backlog
context_budget.externalize before shift: update this plan with chosen manifest subset and proof
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: none unless compact commands point there
context_budget.tiny resumability note: schema-back root manifests through existing contract tooling; do not broaden into codegen
context_budget.context-shift triggers: before broad loader refactor or if manifest schemas require cross-file generation

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Complete the bounded #508 slice with explicit schemas and validated loading for high-priority root manifests.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Preserve extension flexibility and keep custom semantic checks where schemas are the wrong tool.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Manifest subset, helper placement, schema strictness, and focused tests.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The slice cannot be made valuable without validating every root contract manifest.

references.label: Root contract manifest schema child issue

active_milestone.scope: root contract manifest schemas, validated loaders, diagnostics, and inventory status

immediate_next_action: Archive this plan, close #508, refresh external evidence, then promote the next prioritized structured-file-contract slice.
invariants: schemas are machinery and should not become first-contact surfaces
root contract manifests remain extensible unless a field is known closed
open_questions_to_close: which candidate manifests already have schema or typed validation
which subset gives the best value without over-broad schema work
whether load_contract_json should accept optional schema validation or selected callers should wrap it
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests scripts
completion_criteria: Selected high-priority root contract manifests have explicit schemas.
Validated loaders are used for selected schema-backed manifests.
Invalid selected manifests produce actionable diagnostics.
Custom checks remain for cross-file invariants.
Inventory marks selected manifests schema-backed and points to schema owners.

execution_run.what happened: Added explicit schemas for operation_contracts, operation_primitives, conformance_contracts, and improvement_signal_contract; switched high-priority root contract manifest loaders to load_validated_contract_json; recorded validated loader consumption; kept semantic and cross-file checks in check_contract_tooling_surfaces; updated structured-file inventory and tests so the root contract gap is no longer routed to #508.
execution_run.scope touched: root contract schemas, contract tooling loaders, contract checker, python contract consumption policy, structured-file inventory/tests, active plan/state
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run pytest tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py tests/test_contract_tooling.py -q; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests; uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/contracts scripts/check tests/test_structured_file_inventory.py; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "dogfooding closeout review" --format json
execution_run.next step: archive plan and close #508 after commit

durable_residue.promotion trigger: when adding or changing root contract manifests, update schema plus python_contract_consumption or the delegated validator entry
